preset_golden_cross.name: Golden Cross (50/200 EMA)
preset_golden_cross.clause: ( cash ( latest ema( close, 50 ) > latest ema( close, 200 ) and 1 day ago ema( close, 50 ) <= 1 day ago ema( close, 200 ) ) )

preset_macd_bullish.name: MACD Bullish Crossover
